zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hanks於1520年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾邦藍時，她的父親John Hanks IV22歲，母親Annie18歲。她於1540年與Henry John Collett在英國格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hanks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hanke, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In England this personal name was a shortened form of both Hankin and Hancock , both of which were used as pet forms of Henry . The equivalent Middle Dutch names Hanke and Hankin, however, had the sense ‘young John’ and may have been introduced to England by Flemish settlers after the Conquest. There is no evidence to support the suggestion that an English hereditary surname was formed from the Old Norse personal name Anki, a diminutive of personal names such as Arngrim and Arnketill.

variants.name: Hankes
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Khanke (a pet form of Khane, from Hebrew Ḥanna; see Hanna 6), with the Yiddish possessive suffix -s.

variants.name: Hankin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yaron, Abbe, Isadore, Myer, Yitzhak.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hankin, a pet form of Hann , which in English usage was usually a short form of Hanry (Henry), and occasionally perhaps a rhyming pet form of Randal (Randolph). In Middle Dutch, Hankin was a pet form of Johan (John), a usage which may have been brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no examples have yet been found in Middle English where a man named John was also called Hankin. Compare Henkin , Hanks , and Hancock .
English: from Middle English Handekin, a pet form of the personal name Hand, Hond (see Hand ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hanks was born in 1520, in Buckland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hanks IV, was 22 and her mother, Annie, was 18. She married Henry John Collett in 1540, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1556, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hanks(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 벅랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hanks IV(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annie(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 Henry John Collett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Michael's Church, Buckland, Tewkes: ст мачаел'с чурч, буккланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Hanks родилась в 1520 г. в местности буккланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hanks IV было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Annie, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry John Collett в 1540 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1556 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Upper Slaughter, Cotswold district, Glou: Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Hanks nació en 1520, en Buckland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hanks IV, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Annie, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Henry John Collett en 1540, en Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1556, en Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
